import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/staff/TrainingCenter.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/TrainingCenter.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  GraduationCap,
  Search,
  FileText,
  CheckCircle,
  Clock,
  Play,
  BookOpen,
  Award
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
const mockModules = [
  {
    id: "mod-001",
    title: "Emergency Response Training",
    linkedPolicy: "Emergency Evacuation Procedures",
    difficulty: "intermediate",
    duration: "45 min",
    progress: 100,
    status: "completed",
    score: 92
  },
  {
    id: "mod-002",
    title: "Data Privacy Fundamentals",
    linkedPolicy: "Data Privacy Guidelines",
    difficulty: "beginner",
    duration: "30 min",
    progress: 65,
    status: "in-progress",
    dueDate: "2026-04-15"
  },
  {
    id: "mod-003",
    title: "Workplace Safety Standards",
    linkedPolicy: "Workplace Safety Standards",
    difficulty: "beginner",
    duration: "40 min",
    progress: 0,
    status: "not-started",
    dueDate: "2026-04-20"
  },
  {
    id: "mod-004",
    title: "Medication Management",
    linkedPolicy: "Medication Administration Policy",
    difficulty: "advanced",
    duration: "60 min",
    progress: 100,
    status: "completed",
    score: 88
  }
];
export default function StaffTrainingCenter() {
  _s();
  const [modules] = useState(mockModules);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const filteredModules = modules.filter(
    (module) => module.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || module.linkedPolicy.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );
  const completed = modules.filter((m) => m.status === "completed").length;
  const inProgress = modules.filter((m) => m.status === "in-progress").length;
  const avgScore = modules.filter((m) => m.score).reduce((acc, m) => acc + (m.score || 0), 0) / modules.filter((m) => m.score).length || 0;
  const getDifficultyBadge = (difficulty) => {
    const config = {
      beginner: { bg: "bg-green-500/20", text: "text-green-400" },
      intermediate: { bg: "bg-yellow-500/20", text: "text-yellow-400" },
      advanced: { bg: "bg-red-500/20", text: "text-red-400" }
    };
    const style = config[difficulty] || config.beginner;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "c6fd0", _fgB: 1779104382270, className: `px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${style.bg} ${style.text} capitalize`, "data-fg-c6fd0": "418.307:423.10168:/src/app/pages/staff/TrainingCenter.tsx:93:7:2492:130:e:span:x", children: difficulty }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/TrainingCenter.tsx",
      lineNumber: 113,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this);
  };

      "not-started": { bg: "bg-gray-500/20", text: "text-gray-400", label: "Not Started" },
      "in-progress": { bg: "bg-blue-500/20", text: "text-blue-400", label: "In Progress" },

    };

_c = StaffTrainingCenter;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "StaffTrainingCenter");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/TrainingCenter.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/TrainingCenter.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
